mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, email, wechat_id, education_level, school_name, major, gpa_value, gpa_scale, rank_value, target_major_text, intake_term, budget_currency, budget_min, budget_max, budget_note FROM student_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, name, email, wechat_id, education_level, school_name, major, gpa_value, gpa_scale, rank_value, target_major_text, intake_term, budget_currency, budget_min, budget_max, budget_note FROM student_profile WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}

SELECT sp.user_id AS studentUserId, CASE WHEN sp.name IS NOT NULL AND sp.name != '' THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(sp.name, 1, 1), '同学') ELSE CONCAT('学生-', LPAD(sp.user_id, 4, '0')) END AS displayName, sp.education_level AS educationLevel, sp.school_name AS schoolName, sp.major AS major, sp.gpa_value AS gpaValue, sp.gpa_scale AS gpaScale, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(sls.language_type, ' ', TRIM(TRAILING '.00' FROM sls.score)) ORDER BY sls.id SEPARATOR ' / ') AS languageSummary, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT stc.country_name ORDER BY stc.id SEPARATOR '、') AS targetCountries, sp.target_major_text AS targetMajorText, sp.intake_term AS intakeTerm FROM student_profile sp JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = sp.user_id AND ua.role = 'STUDENT' AND ua.status = 'ACTIVE' JOIN verification_record vrn ON vrn.user_id = sp.user_id AND vrn.verify_type = 'REAL_NAME' AND vrn.status = 'APPROVED' JOIN verification_record vre ON vre.user_id = sp.user_id AND vre.verify_type = 'EDUCATION' AND vre.status = 'APPROVED' LEFT JOIN student_target_country stc ON stc.user_id = sp.user_id LEFT JOIN student_language_score sls ON sls.user_id = sp.user_id
AND ( sp.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sp.school_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sp.major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sp.target_major_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stc.country_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM student_target_country c WHERE c.user_id = sp.user_id AND c.country_name IN ('德国', '法国', '荷兰', '瑞士', '瑞典', '爱尔兰', '意大利', '西班牙', '欧洲') )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM student_target_country c WHERE c.user_id = sp.user_id AND c.country_name NOT IN ('美国', '英国', '加拿大', '澳洲', '澳大利亚', '新加坡', '中国香港', '香港', '德国', '法国', '荷兰', '瑞士', '瑞典', '爱尔兰', '意大利', '西班牙', '欧洲') )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM student_target_country c WHERE c.user_id = sp.user_id AND (c.country_name = #{country} OR (#{country} = '澳洲' AND c.country_name = '澳大利亚') OR (#{country} = '中国香港' AND c.country_name = '香港')) )
AND sp.education_level = #{educationLevel}
AND sp.gpa_value >= 3.0
AND sp.gpa_value >= 3.3
AND sp.gpa_value >= 3.5
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM student_language_score ls WHERE ls.user_id = sp.user_id AND ls.language_type = 'IELTS' AND ls.score >= 6.5)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM student_language_score ls WHERE ls.user_id = sp.user_id AND ls.language_type = 'IELTS' AND ls.score >= 7)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM student_language_score ls WHERE ls.user_id = sp.user_id AND ls.language_type = 'TOEFL' AND ls.score >= 90)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM student_language_score ls WHERE ls.user_id = sp.user_id AND ls.language_type = 'TOEFL' AND ls.score >= 100)
AND (sp.major REGEXP '工程|工科|计算机|软件|数据|人工智能|机械|电子|电气|材料|土木|自动化' OR sp.target_major_text REGEXP '工程|工科|计算机|软件|数据|人工智能|机械|电子|电气|材料|土木|自动化')
AND (sp.major REGEXP '商科|金融|会计|管理|经济|市场|商业|运营|供应链|MBA|BA|商业分析' OR sp.target_major_text REGEXP '商科|金融|会计|管理|经济|市场|商业|运营|供应链|MBA|BA|商业分析')
AND (sp.major REGEXP '理科|数学|物理|化学|生物|统计|环境|地理|科学' OR sp.target_major_text REGEXP '理科|数学|物理|化学|生物|统计|环境|地理|科学')
AND (sp.major REGEXP '文社科|传媒|教育|法学|法律|社会|心理|政治|公共|语言|文学|历史|艺术|设计' OR sp.target_major_text REGEXP '文社科|传媒|教育|法学|法律|社会|心理|政治|公共|语言|文学|历史|艺术|设计')
GROUP BY sp.user_id, sp.name, sp.education_level, sp.school_name, sp.major, sp.gpa_value, sp.gpa_scale, sp.target_major_text, sp.intake_term ORDER BY sp.user_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE student_profile SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, wechat_id = #{wechatId}, education_level = #{educationLevel}, school_name = #{schoolName}, major = #{major}, gpa_value = #{gpaValue}, gpa_scale = #{gpaScale}, rank_value = #{rankValue}, target_major_text = #{targetMajorText}, intake_term = #{intakeTerm}, budget_currency = #{budgetCurrency}, budget_min = #{budgetMin}, budget_max = #{budgetMax}, budget_note = #{budgetNote} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
